summary: Completed testing of Iteration 4 features: Per-model prompt customization, endless carousel, markdown rendering, attachment upload flow, and Agent Zero non-UI endpoints. All 12 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified - all new features functioning correctly.

issues: Fixed: nested button HTML elements in Endpoint Connection Info section

critical_code_review_comments: Per-model prompt customization dialog correctly shows Role, Prompt modifier, Verbosity slider, Alignment options
Endless carousel navigation working - loops from '3 of 3' back to '1-2 of 3' correctly when >2 models selected
Markdown rendering using ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm - renders bold, lists, code blocks, tables, links
Attachment button (paperclip) and hidden file input present; attachment routing dialog structure verified
Agent Zero non-UI endpoints all functional: /api/a0/non-ui/options, /conversations, /transcript/{id}, /chat/stream
Chat payload correctly accepts attachments with target_mode (all/selected) and target_models array
A0Settings ENDPOINTS list updated to include new non-UI endpoints
seed_data_creation: Created test conversations via /api/chat/stream with attachment payloads (conversation IDs prefixed with test_attach_, test_permodel_, test_context_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 features all verified: (1) Per-model prompt customization button in ResponsePanel header opens dialog with role/modifier/verbosity/alignment controls, (2) Carousel shows 'Viewing X-Y of Z' and loops endlessly when clicking prev/next, (3) ReactMarkdown with remarkGfm renders bold, lists, code blocks, tables, links in responses, (4) Attachment upload button triggers file input, pending attachments show in preview with 'Route attachments' button opening routing dialog, (5) Agent Zero non-UI API endpoints tested and working.
